frames.scene: Stick standing in front of an open fridge, clock on wall shows 10:00, morning light
Stick staring into the fridge with wide curious eyes
Stick closing the fridge door firmly, determined expression
Close-up of Stick's face with a small lightbulb drawn above his head
Stick looking at his own body with curiosity, arrows pointing inward to his torso
A large ON/OFF switch labeled REPARACION, Stick pointing at it excitedly
Stick eating a big meal, a large upward arrow next to him labeled insulina
A giant cell door wide open, tiny packages being delivered through it non-stop
Construction stick-figure workers carrying boxes through the open cell door
Workers inside a cell stacking boxes labeled construccion, no cleaning crew in sight
Dirty cluttered cell interior, dust everywhere, no cleaning happening
Stick sitting with a coffee, arrow going down labeled insulina
The giant cell door closing slowly, construction workers leaving with their boxes
A tiny cleaning crew in overalls entering through the closed door with mops and tools
Text AUTOFAGIA in bold with Stick pointing at it, Greek letters scattered in background
The cleaning crew inside a cell finding tangled broken protein strings on the floor
Crew dismantling broken parts with tiny tools, sorting pieces into two piles
Good pieces going into a bin labeled reutilizar, bad pieces into a trash can
A building being renovated from the inside, scaffolding inside, clean facade outside
Construction workers trying to enter the cell door but it is closed, they wait outside
Stick eating a snack, clock ticking, construction workers always at the door again
Stick's body silhouette as a dusty building that was never renovated
A large stopwatch showing 14 to 16 hours, cleaning crew waiting patiently
A clock face split: 16 dark hours labeled ayuno, 8 bright hours labeled comer
Stick relaxing with coffee, label 16:8 with a green checkmark
Timeline: Stick eats at 12, eats at 20, a bracket spanning 16 hours labeled mantenimiento
Tiny maintenance workers operating inside Stick's body silhouette during the 16-hour gap
Stick flexing, tiny glowing batteries inside his muscles labeled mitocondrias
Two batteries side by side: one dim labeled insulina alta, one bright labeled ayuno
A car engine with clogged dirty filters versus clean filters, same engine label
The clean-filter engine with speed lines, running better
Stick's brain with a fuel gauge needle moving from glucosa to cetonas
The liver labeled higado producing small pentagon shapes labeled cetonas
Stick's brain glowing with stars, alert focused expression
Stick with clear sharp eyes and upright posture, no fog or cloud around his head
Warning sign labeled OJO, a clock timeline showing 12 to 16 hours
A bar chart glycogen tank emptying slowly over 16 hours
16:8 label with green checkmark, cleaning crew giving thumbs up
Stick looking at his watch, thought bubble showing a plate and a clock
A simple eating window timeline: breakfast time arrow to dinner time, bracket showing gap
Two timelines side by side: old eating schedule versus new schedule with bigger gap
Stick with a medical cross symbol and a doctor stick figure in white coat
Stick standing next to a person in a wheelchair and a person with a heart symbol
An open science book with beaker and molecules, label la ciencia dice
A light switch labeled interruptor de reparacion being turned ON, light radiates
Stick holding a sign that reads el ayuno no es una dieta
A clock face with a bracket labeled ventana de tiempo
Same food portions squeezed into a smaller time window on a timeline diagram
Cleaning crew repair workers and recycling team all working together inside Stick's body
Stick sleeping peacefully, cleaning crew working inside him, label ayuno
A sleep timeline extended by 2 hours with an arrow labeled alargar la ventana
Stick closing the fridge one more time, calm satisfied smile
Stick making a black coffee, steam rising from the cup
Stick sitting quietly by a window, coffee in hand, peaceful morning light
Stick with a thought bubble containing an hourglass
Stick standing tall, confident fist-bump pose. Text below: Stick to the plan.
